description: Generic per-monitor drive-cycle steps. Override per-OEM by registering a TDriveCycleResolver.

entries.description: Cold start, idle 30 s, accelerate to 90 km/h, cruise 5 min, decelerate without braking. Repeat once.
Cruise at 80 km/h in closed loop for 5 minutes after warm-up.
After warm-up, idle 30 s and cruise 5 min in closed loop.
Two stabilised cruises at 65 km/h for 3 min each, separated by 15 s of deceleration without braking.
Cold start; let the catalyst reach light-off temperature.
Cold start with fuel level between 1/4 and 3/4. Idle 4 min, cruise 50–80 km/h for 10 min.
Cold start; idle until secondary air pump cycles off (~30–90 s).
Cruise at constant speed in closed loop for 10 minutes.
Cold start; let oxygen sensors heat up (~30 s after start).
Cruise at 80 km/h for 5 min, then decelerate to 30 km/h with foot off accelerator.
Run A/C for at least 10 minutes at idle and cruise.
Diesel cold start; sustained cruise at 60–90 km/h for 15 min.
Diesel: highway cruise 80–100 km/h for 20 min after AdBlue dosing.
Three full-throttle accelerations from 30–100 km/h with full warm-up.
Cold start; 20 min mixed driving including idle and cruise.
Diesel: cruise above 60 km/h for 20 min to reach regen temperature.
Cruise 60–80 km/h for 10 min after warm-up.
